title: Heralds II
description: Heralds II is a mod all about Flags, Banners, Heraldry & more! featuring a hand-made list of over 1000 designs! All in a vanilla-friendly way!
body:
### For Minecraft 1.20.1, please update to the latest version of forge.

Heralds II is a mod all about **Flags, Banners, Heraldry & more!** featuring a hand-made list of over 850 flags from the basics to references to pride! It's all about showing who owns what territory, and these flags are how you show that you mean business (or to surrender).

Now you can adventure forth & lay claims with a unique set of _850+ hand-designed flags_, or show off your heraldry talent by making one of each! Or better yet, mass produce them & turn them into a commodity to win hearts with culture!  
  

The Mod is split into 4 parts

## The Basics

The Basic set of flags is a collection of 27 blank colour flags that can be used on their own, or used in practically every recipe for new flags. Also includes a Pirate flag!
  

## Custom

The mod (as of 2.4) now provides 27 flags & banners that can have their textures swapped out using a resource pack! My discord server has a file that makes the process of creating a mod-matching texture far easier too. Feel free to post these custom resource packs, just with the necessary "requires this mod" thing.
  

## Pride

Can't have a flag mod without a little pride, and there are 82 pride flag options  
  

## References

This is the meat & bone of the mod, 700+ Hand-Made flags all from various franchises, including but not limited to.

*   The Elder Scrolls
*   Fallout
*   Star Trek
*   Helldivers 2
*   SPORE
*   Ratchet & Clank
*   Half Life
*   TF2
*   Portal
*   Dune
*   Warhammer Fantasy & Warhammer 40K
*   Star Wars
*   Mass Effect
*   Red Faction
*   Borderlands & Tiny Tina's Wonderlands
*   Baldur's Gate
*   TAWOG
*   Tribes
*   ARMA
*   Just Cause
*   Saints Row
*   Super Mario
*   Assassin's Creed
*   Watch_Dogs
*   Minecraft
*   & so much more!

This mod is an absolute beast to work on, please consider donating so I can continue to add more referential banners for beloved (and often mismanaged) franchises. I'll add more anyways, but anything that makes this mod easier to work on helps.
https://ko-fi.com/lunakibby
